mapper.sql: tc.employee_id, tc.credential_name, tc.credential_type, tc.specific_project, tc.grant_organization, tc.grant_date, tc.validity_date, tc.admin_adress, tc.store_adress, tc.appraisal_flag, tc.enabled_flag, tc.id, tc.create_time, tc.create_by, tc.update_time, tc.update_by, tc.admin_adress_type, tc.store_adress_type

${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_employee_id, ${tAlias}.credential_name as ${tAlias}_credential_name, ${tAlias}.credential_type as ${tAlias}_credential_type, ${tAlias}.specific_project as ${tAlias}_specific_project, ${tAlias}.grant_organization as ${tAlias}_grant_organization, ${tAlias}.grant_date as ${tAlias}_grant_date, ${tAlias}.validity_date as ${tAlias}_validity_date, ${tAlias}.admin_adress as ${tAlias}_admin_adress, ${tAlias}.store_adress as ${tAlias}_store_adress, ${tAlias}.appraisal_flag as ${tAlias}_appraisal_flag, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.admin_adress_type as ${tAlias}_admin_adress_type, ${tAlias}.store_adress_type as ${tAlias}_store_adress_type

select pe.name, pe.work_card, ( SELECT fdt.dept_name FROM fnd_dept fdt WHERE fd.ext_dept_id = fdt.id ) AS dept_name, ( SELECT fdt.dept_name FROM fnd_dept fdt WHERE fd.ext_department_id = fdt.id ) AS department, ( SELECT fdt.dept_name FROM fnd_dept fdt WHERE fd.ext_team_id = fdt.id ) AS team, 0 as check_dialog_flag, 0 as del_dialog_flag,
from td_credential tc join pm_employee pe on pe.id = tc.employee_id and pe.enabled_flag = 1 join pm_employee_job pej on pe.id = pej.employee_id and pej.job_main_flag = 1 and pej.enabled_flag = 1 join fnd_dept fd on fd.id = pej.dept_id and fd.enabled_flag = 1
mapper.insert: insert into td_credential (employee_id, credential_name, credential_type, specific_project, grant_organization, grant_date, validity_date, admin_adress, store_adress, appraisal_flag, enabled_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, admin_adress_type,store_adress_type) values (#{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{credentialName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{credentialType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{specificProject,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{grantOrganization,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{grantDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{validityDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{adminAdress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{storeAdress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{appraisalFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{adminAdressType, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{storeAdressType, jdbcType = VARCHAR})
